problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
